case_title: FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK VS. HERMINIA MADAYAG et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MADAYAG, HERMINIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-15-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-16-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-31-2002
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $144.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MADAYAG, HERMINIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST NORTH AMERICAN NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADAYAG, HERMINIA $1,737.66 PRINCIPAL, $25.44 INTEREST, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,907.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-15-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
